text: Judge blocks closure of Kennedy Center and orders removal of Trump's name - CBS News
fullText: A judge blocked the Kennedy Center from closing its doors during renovations, and ruled that its board acted unlawfully by adding President Trump's name to the building. The president reacted by saying he wants Congress to take it over.

text: Carcass of Timmy the humpback whale brought to shore in Denmark - NPR
fullText: The humpback whale, nicknamed "Timmy" by German media, died following a controversial failed rescue effort. His carcass had been drifting near the Danish shore for two weeks.

text: A Texas woman thought her new diet was causing digestive issues. Doctors found cancer: "I couldn't believe it" - CBS News

text: Hegseth Hails US Allies in Asia, Hits Out at European Nations - Bloomberg.com

text: Millions of breast cancer patients could safely avoid chemotherapy, study suggests - BBC
